key_outputs.dual_momentum_selector: src/etf/dual_momentum.py - pure; reuses MomentumRotation (momentum/clock/top-K/hysteresis) verbatim, adds the abs-filter + offensive/defensive regime split; same interface as EtfMomentumSelector
key_outputs.mode_switch: etf.selection.mode rotation|dual_momentum via build_selector factory; loop + backtester mode-agnostic; default rotation (opt-in, reversible)
key_outputs.universe_union: dual_momentum mode -> tradable universe = offensive + defensive (config_etf), unless ETF_UNIVERSE set
key_outputs.R3_parity: tests/test_etf_stage3.py pins closed-candle live view == backtester point-in-time slice across a rotating window (golden-master vs dual-codepath drift)
key_outputs.R8_reconcile: split/qty-drift now FLAGGED (alert) not closed; basis never auto-rewritten; position-gone still auto-closes; reconcile returns notes -> Telegram
key_outputs.R10_pdt_guard: opened_today() + loop guard never round-trips a symbol same day (etf.pdt_guard, default on)
key_outputs.regime_alerts: loop alerts + logs on risk-on/off flips (dual_momentum)

self_review.correctness: logic + edge cases tested (risk-on/off, abs hurdle incl 0.0 fallback, top_k, short-history, drift, same-day); parity test pins live==backtest
self_review.design: one pure selector + factory + minimal loop/risk wiring; single-responsibility; maximal reuse of MomentumRotation
self_review.safety: two-key tripwire untouched; fail-closed clock + no-phantom-fill preserved; reconcile never auto-misstates basis; no secrets; least privilege
self_review.simplicity: few parameters; correlation cap deferred with rationale (ADR-006); chandelier stop deferred to a v2/Stage-4 decision

assumptions: dual_momentum default config: offensive {SPY,EFA,EEM}, defensive {TLT,IEF,GLD,BIL}, BIL hurdle, 252d lookback, top_k 1, ~monthly
default selection.mode stays rotation until Stage-4 validates dual_momentum
open_issues: ETF backtester still zero-cost / no IS-OOS / no benchmarks (Stage 4 builds the real harness)
changes committed? pending; this is a MANDATORY human checkpoint on risk/sizing/exec code
handoff.next_focus: Stage 4: realistic cost+slippage+gap-at-open harness; walk-forward IS/OOS; regimes (2008/2020/2022/chop); Monte-Carlo; param sensitivity; metrics vs control-A, SPY, 60/40; after-tax.

correctness.reasoning: Selector logic + reconcile + PDT guard unit-tested across happy/edge/error paths; R3 parity test empirically found and fixed a real test bug (per-symbol closed_view) and now pins live==backtest; full suite 246 green.

design.reasoning: New pure selector reuses MomentumRotation verbatim; mode factory keeps loop/backtester unchanged; single-responsibility modules; low coupling.

robustness.reasoning: Few-parameter design; abs hurdle has a safe 0.0 fallback; insufficient-history path yields cash; reconcile never auto-misstates basis. Real OOS robustness still to be proven in Stage 4.

safety_compliance.reasoning: Tripwire/fail-closed clock/no-phantom-fill preserved; PDT guard guarantees zero same-day round-trips; split-drift flagged not auto-applied; no secrets; default mode unchanged (opt-in).

simplicity.reasoning: Minimal new surface; correlation cap and chandelier stop deferred with explicit ADR rationale rather than speculatively added.

clarity.reasoning: ADRs per decision, YAML documented, ETF_MOMENTUM updated, docstrings explain the why (esp. the defensive sleeve and flag-only reconcile).

issues_found: Dual-momentum profitability unproven until Stage 4 (by design)
ETF backtester still inadequate for go/no-go (Stage 4 scope)
suggested_revisions: Mandatory human review of the risk/sizing/execution changes (risk.py reconcile/opened_today, main.py loop) before Stage 4
